## Checklist

- [ ] Focused — one concern per PR
- [ ] Conventional Commit title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test:members`, `INTAKE_TEST_STUB=1 pnpm test:intake`)
- [ ] Screenshot included for UI changes
- [ ] No secrets, no `.data/`, no network in tests
